meals.NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A meal with this name already exists
meals.HAS_LINKED_SCHEDULES: Cannot deactivate this meal because it is linked to meal schedules
meals.DEACTIVATE_LINKED_SCHEDULES: Cannot deactivate this meal while it is part of an active meal schedule
meals.INVALID_CATEGORY: Category must be breakfast, lunch, dinner, or suhoor

meal_day_schedules.CREATE_FAILED: Failed to create meal day schedule
meal_day_schedules.FETCH_FAILED: Failed to retrieve meal day schedules
meal_day_schedules.UPDATE_FAILED: Failed to update meal day schedule
meal_day_schedules.DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete meal day schedule
meal_day_schedules.DUPLICATE_DATE: A meal day schedule already exists for this date
meal_day_schedules.BOOKING_START_BEFORE_END: Booking start time must be before booking end time
meal_day_schedules.BOOKING_WINDOW_TOO_SHORT: Booking window must be at least 1 hour
meal_day_schedules.SCHEDULE_MUST_BE_FUTURE: Booking times must be set in the future
meal_day_schedules.SCHEDULE_LOCKED: This schedule cannot be modified because delivery has already started

meal_slots.MEAL_NOT_FOUND: The specified meal was not found
meal_slots.MEAL_INACTIVE: Cannot create a slot for an inactive meal
meal_slots.DELIVERY_START_BEFORE_END: Delivery start time must be before delivery end time
meal_slots.BOOKING_MUST_PRECEDE_DELIVERY: Booking window must fully precede the delivery window
meal_slots.KITCHEN_PREP_TIME_INSUFFICIENT: There must be at least 2 hours between booking end time and delivery start time
meal_slots.DUPLICATE_CATEGORY_SAME_DAY: A slot for this meal category already exists in this day schedule
meal_slots.SLOT_LOCKED: This slot cannot be modified because delivery has already started
